Variables.Name: ComponentTemplate
Variables.Description: Template for the component to create

Variables.Name: CookedComponentInstancingData
Variables.Description: Cached data for faster runtime instancing (only used in cooked builds)

Variables.Name: VariableName
Variables.Description: If non-None, creates a variable in the class and assigns the created blueprint to it

Variables.Name: AttachToName
Variables.Description: SocketBone that Node might attach to

Variables.Name: ParentComponentOrVariableName
Variables.Description: Component template or variable that Node might be parented to

Variables.Name: ParentComponentOwnerClassName
Variables.Description: If the node is attached to another node inherited from a parent Blueprint, this contains the name of the Blueprint parent class that owns the component template

Variables.Name: bIsParentComponentNative
Variables.Description: If the node is parented, this indicates whether or not the template is found in the CDO's Components array

Variables.Name: bIsNative_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: (DEPRECATED) Indicates if this is a native component or not

Variables.Name: NativeComponentName_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: (DEPRECATED) If this is a native component, this is the name of the UActorComponent

Variables.Name: bVariableNameAutoGenerated_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: (DEPRECATED) If true, the variable name was a autogenerated and is not presented to the user

Variables.Name: InternalVariableName
Variables.Description: Internal variable name. This is used for:
